error_signature: Input values have 2 keys, you must specify an input key
title: Simple Memory node requires specific input key
symptom: The Simple Memory node throws an error stating that input values have 2 keys and requires a specific input key to be set.
not_this_if: Error does not occur in Simple Memory node
root_cause: The Simple Memory node expects a single input key to function correctly. When multiple keys are present in the input, it cannot determine which key to use, leading to the error message.
fix_steps: Open the Simple Memory node settings
Set the 'Input Key' to the desired key name
Save the workflow and re-run it
agent_instruction: Set the 'Input Key' in the Simple Memory node to the key you want to use.
